chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3780 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.16157/2025 3. For orders on Nazir report dated 7.08.2025 4. For hearing of CMA No.15564/2025 5. For hearing of main case 6. For orders on CMA No.4081/2026 (U/s 151 CPC) 17.02.2026 M/s. Abid S. Zuberi and Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocates alongwith petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh ---------------------- Through instant application CMA No.4081/2026, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks withdrawal of an amount of Rs. 2.5 million, which was deposited in terms of order dated 01.08.2025. Pursuant to directions, the Nazir of this Court has submitted compliance report dated 07.08.2025, which reveals that the petitioner had deposited an amount of Rs. 2,500,000/- in the shape of a cheque bearing No.939427 dated 05.08.2025 drawn on Bank Islami, which was credited into Bank account of Nazir office. Since the main order passed by the learned Ombudsman has been set aside by the Appellate Authority, therefore, the amount deposited by the petitioner before this Court is no more required, hence, learned Assistant Attorney General as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh have no objection. Accordingly, the application in hand is allowed. Petition also stands disposed of as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro

JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3780 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.16157/2025 3. For orders on Nazir report dated 7.08.2025 4. For hearing of CMA No.15564/2025 5. For hearing of main case 6. For orders on CMA No.4081/2026 (U/s 151 CPC) 17.02.2026 M/s. Abid S. Zuberi and Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocates alongwith petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh ---------------------- Through instant application CMA No.4081/2026, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks withdrawal of an amount of Rs. 2.5 million, which was deposited in terms of order dated 01.08.2025. Pursuant to directions, the Nazir of this Court has submitted compliance report dated 07.08.2025, which reveals that the petitioner had deposited an amount of Rs. 2,500,000/- in the shape of a cheque bearing No.939427 dated 05.08.2025 drawn on Bank Islami, which was credited into Bank account of Nazir office. Since the main order passed by the learned Ombudsman has been set aside by the Appellate Authority, therefore, the amount deposited by the petitioner before this Court is no more required, hence, learned Assistant Attorney General as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh waive notice of this application and extend their no objection. Accordingly, the same is allowed. Petition also stands disposed of as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST.
Petition also stands disposed of as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
